summary: Wire Workbench verification e2e to the dynamically started BFF port.
rationale: scripts/verify-dev-workbench.sh starts seektalent-ui-api on an available local port, but the final React Playwright e2e step started Vite with its default backend proxy target of 127.0.0.1:8012. Passing the dynamic port into the e2e Vite process keeps the required Workbench gate self-contained in local and CI runs.
verification: uv run ruff check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
uv run ty check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
deletion_targets: implicit e2e dependency on a separately running BFF at 127.0.0.1:8012
risks: The e2e Vite dev server must continue to proxy API calls to the same backend instance used for OpenAPI generation.
Local callers that intentionally set SEEKTALENT_DEV_BACKEND_PORT must still be able to run app e2e outside the verification script.
